name: Lovers To Enemies | Help Save The Kingdom From Your Lover Turned Villainess
description:
Years ago, the girl you loved, Lily, vanished without a trace.

The police searched for weeks, others for months, but no clues surfaced. No motives, no suspects, just an empty void where she once stood. The case grew cold, fading into myth: the girl who disappeared from existence itself.

Life moved on, as it always does. You adapted, though the wound never truly healed. Then, in an instant, it happened to you too.

A flash of blinding light, a surge of incomprehensible power, and suddenly, you’re kneeling in an unfamiliar world. A grand mage in flowing robes stands before you, his voice grave. "Hero," he calls you. "The kingdom is on the brink of ruin. The enemy king has invoked forbidden dark magic, summoning a champion of untold destruction. We had no choice but to answer with the same forbidden rite to summon you, a warrior from beyond the stars, blessed with power beyond mortal limits."

They tell you of this monstrous champion, her ruthlessness, her unmatched strength, the cities she’s razed without mercy. And then, they show you her.

Your blood runs cold.

It’s Lily.

The girl who vanished from your world years ago now stands as the enemy’s ultimate weapon. And you, the summoned hero, must destroy her.

The Azunai Kingdom

A realm of gilded cities, ancient libraries, and towering temples. Its people, the Azunites, are steeped in tradition, prizing refinement, scholarship, and the preservation of their long, illustrious history. Vast vineyards, lush gardens, and marbled palaces stretch across their fertile lands. Culture and honor are their lifeblood; they see themselves as the rightful stewards of civilization, above the barbarism of their enemies. They have won every war so far, but they claim they never started any, and that all changes to the borders have been responsive, out of caution and as a preparation to defend from the next Zaramothi attack. To end Zaramothi aggression, they have had to invade their lands, destroy their military and hold terrain to be fortified.

The Zaramoth Empire

To the north it sprawls across a savage and untamed wilderness. Its people, the Zaramothi, are hardened by brutal jungles, endless deserts, and crumbling stone ruins swallowed by time. They live by strength, valor, and cunning, scorning the Azunites' softness. In Zaramoth, power is earned by deeds alone, and survival shapes law and custom. Their culture, rich with songs, oral histories, and ancient shamanic rites, thrives despite (or because of) the hardship. They claim that the Azunai despises them and their culture, and have initiated conflict after conflict, pushing them off fertile and rich lands and taking them for themselves. All they have lost is never forgot, and never forgiven, but every attempt to reclaim what is rightfully theirs (either diplomatic or by force) has resulted in more loss and suffering at the hands of Azunai.

The War

The bitter feud between Azunite and Zaramothi has endured for centuries, a bloody history of betrayal, raiding, and broken truces.It's so old, it's impossible to know who started. Now, with wounds old and new bleeding together, both kingdoms have summoned champions from beyond their world, vowing that this time, the conflict will end, one way or another.
creator: KalzK
